message:
🐛 Add llm-d component image tags to Netlify nightly E2E function (#1651)

The Netlify serverless function (which serves console.kubestellar.io)
was missing llmdImages/otherImages fields that the Go backend already
had. This caused the nightly E2E card tooltips on production to not
show llm-d component tags even though the frontend code supported it.

Adds image metadata constants matching the Go handler and passes them
through in the API response.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
